questionHtml: Outline how these results indicate that blackberry distribution is limited by light intensity.
markschemeHtml:
a. as light level changes so does the percentage cover «of blackberry» ✔

b. distribution is higher at intermediate/moderate light intensities ✔ Accept appropriate numerical values

c. little growth at low light intensities
OR
little growth at high light intensities ✔ Accept appropriate numerical values

d. distribution is bell shaped ✔

meta.title: Outline how these results indicate that blackberry distribution is limited by light intensity.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
